title: Classical Optimizers for Quantum Circuits
description: Master classical optimization techniques for variational quantum algorithms, including gradient-based and gradient-free methods, optimizer configuration, and convergence monitoring strategies.
learningObjectives: Compare gradient-based and gradient-free optimization methods for quantum circuits
Configure and tune classical optimizers for variational algorithms
Implement parameter shift rules for quantum gradient computation
Design convergence monitoring and early stopping strategies
Select appropriate optimizers based on problem characteristics
